title: Raccoon Removal in Sunnyside, Queens | $900–$4,000
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Sunnyside, Queens. Humane trapping, exclusion, and cleanup. Licensed experts serving Sunnyside Gardens and surrounding areas. Call today!
intro: Raccoons are increasingly common in Sunnyside, Queens, where tree-lined streets and accessible attics in low-rise buildings create ideal nesting conditions. Our professional raccoon removal services protect Sunnyside homes and businesses from property damage, noise, and health risks associated with these clever wildlife intruders. Best Pest Control NYC provides humane, effective raccoon extraction and exclusion throughout Sunnyside and neighboring Queens communities.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Sunnyside for years, understanding the unique challenges posed by raccoons in this densely populated yet green Queens neighborhood. Our licensed technicians use humane trapping methods, complete exclusion repairs, and thorough sanitization to ensure raccoons don't return to your property.
localContext: Sunnyside's charming garden apartments, historic Sunnyside Gardens co-ops, and proximity to Calvary Cemetery provide ample cover and food sources that attract raccoons year-round. The neighborhood's mature trees and accessible rooflines make attic invasions particularly common in both prewar buildings and newer construction along Queens Boulevard.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Sunnyside, Queens?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Sunnyside typically costs between $900 and $4,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, entry points requiring exclusion, and necessary attic cleanup or sanitation. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Sunnyside?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are quite common in Sunnyside due to the neighborhood's tree-lined streets, garden apartments with accessible attics, and proximity to green spaces like Calvary Cemetery. They're particularly active in spring when mothers seek safe nesting spots for their young.

faqs.question: Is raccoon removal humane in Sunnyside?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Best Pest Control NYC uses only humane, live-trapping methods that comply with New York State wildlife regulations. We safely relocate raccoons and implement exclusion techniques to prevent re-entry, ensuring both animal welfare and your property's protection.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Sunnyside home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service in Sunnyside for urgent raccoon situations. The complete removal process typically takes 3-7 days depending on the number of animals and whether babies are present. We'll inspect your property immediately and begin trapping right away.
